title: polypodium finlaysonianum
intro: Polypodium finlaysonianum, also known as the Himalayan polypody, is a type of fern native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polypodium finlaysonianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as coughs, colds, and skin infections.
